prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次分别为30319→28410→23710→38682→43771，整体呈波动上升趋势（位次数字增大），2024年因新高考改革出现较大波动，202 5年基准约43771名；该校在河南省理科（物理类）招生计划：2021年137人、2022年152人、2023年164人、2024年186人、2025年175人、2026年167人。20 26年较2025年缩招8人（-4.6%），缩招意味着竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南昌大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第69–78位区间，2026年排名 第74位，属于中上层次综合类大学；2026年声誉评价偏正面，主要因南昌大学男排在2025–2026赛季CUVA总决赛中夺冠，提升了学校知名度和体育声誉；抖音热 度排名第43位（较热），短视频曝光量较高，反映报考关注度有所升温。历史投档异常方面，2023年曾出现与武汉大学比较的偏低关注信号，但影响有限；食品 科学与工程为A+学科（第五轮学科评估），是该校唯一A-及以上学科，与招生专业中的食品科学与工程类、食品营养与健康等直接关联，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程、临床医学等工科/医学专业社会热度持续较高；河南省2026年普通高考总人数约120万（较2025年物理类+历史类约90万明显增长），考生规 模扩大加剧整体竞争，近年波动不大；南昌大学位于江西省南昌市，属中部地区，对河南省考生而言属于跨省就 读，地域偏好中性；该校在河南招生规模较大（理科167人），属于省外重点生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动上升趋势、2026年计划小幅缩招、河南省考生规模大 幅增加以及学校声誉正面升温，预计2026年理科（物理类）录取竞争较2025年有所加剧。预测最低位次约42770名，区间42270–43270名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were 30319 → 28410 → 23710 → 38682 → 43771, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (increasing ranking numbers). In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform, there was a significant fluctuation, with the 2025 baseline approximately at 43771. The enrollment plan for this university in Henan Province for science (physics category) is: 137 in 2021, 152 in 2022, 164 in 2023, 186 in 2024, 175 in 2025, and 167 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees a reduction of 8 students (-4.6%), indicating slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanchang University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it has been stable in the 69–78 range in recent years, ranking 74th in 2026, placing it in the upper-middle tier of comprehensive universities. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is generally positive, mainly due to the Nanchang University men's volleyball team winning the championship in the 2025–2026 CUVA finals, enhancing the university's visibility and sports reputation. Its Douyin popularity ranks 43rd (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, reflecting increased attention for applications. Historically, there was a low-attention signal in 2023 compared to Wuhan University, but the impact was limited. Food Science and Engineering is an A+ discipline (fifth round of discipline evaluation), the only A- or above discipline at this university, directly related to majors such as Food Science and Engineering and Food Nutrition and Health in the enrollment list, attracting some interest for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity remains high for engineering/medical majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Clinical Medicine. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Henan Province general college entrance examination is approximately 1.2 million (a significant increase from about 900,000 for physics + history categories in 2025), with the expanded candidate scale intensifying overall competition, though fluctuations have been small in recent years. Nanchang University is located in Nanchang City, Jiangxi Province, in the central region, and is considered a cross-province study option for Henan candidates, with neutral regional preference. The university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Henan (167 for science), making it a key out-of-province source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating upward trend in historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 plan, the significant increase in the number of candidates in Henan Province, and the positive warming of the university's reputation, it is expected that admission competition for science (physics category) in 2026 will intensify compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 42770, with a range of 42270–43270.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 42270–43270, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a stretch and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 42000), focus on stretching for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Oral Medicine, Clinical Medicine, and Computer Science. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., above 43000), mainly choose Tier 2 and safety Tier 3 majors, and cautiously stretch for Tier 1. Although Food Science and Engineering is in Tier 3, its discipline evaluation is A+, offering high cost-performance, and deserves special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were 4295 → 3958 → 3990 → 5265 → 7705 respectively. Since 2024, the rankings have significantly shifted backward. In 2025, due to the new college entrance examination reform (history category), there was a large fluctuation, with a baseline of approximately 7705. The enrollment plan for this university in Henan Province for liberal arts (history category) was: 34 in 2021, 39 in 2022, 36 in 2023, 30 in 2024, 43 in 2025, and 34 in 2026. Compared to 2025, the 2026 enrollment plan reduces by 9 students (-20.9%), a significant reduction, leading to intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanchang University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In recent years, its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been stable in the range of 69–78, ranking 74th in 2026, belonging to the upper-middle level comprehensive universities. The reputation evaluation in 2026 is relatively positive, mainly due to the men's volleyball team winning the championship, which increased the university's visibility. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 43rd (relatively hot), and the attention for applications has increased. In terms of historical admission anomalies, there was a low attention signal in 2023, but the impact was limited. Food Science and Engineering is an A+ discipline, although mainly corresponding to science majors, as a signature discipline of the university, it enhances the overall reputation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature is stable. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Henan Province general college entrance examination is approximately 1.2 million (significantly increased compared to 2025), and the expansion of the candidate pool intensifies overall competition, with little fluctuation in recent years. Nanchang University is located in Nanchang City, Jiangxi Province, belonging to the central region. For Henan candidates studying across provinces, regional preference is neutral. The university's enrollment scale for liberal arts in Henan is small (34 students), leading to relatively fierce competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the trend of backward rankings in recent years, the significant reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (-20.9%), and the notable increase in the number of candidates in Henan Province, it is expected that the admission competition for liberal arts (history category) in 2026 will be significantly more intense than in 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6817, with a range of 6317–7317.
